primary_comparison: FULL vs OFF within candidate and host lane
multiplicity: Holm correction across candidate primary comparisons within each host lane

causal_protocols.BODY_CARRIER: single-turn static body ablation; valid only for body estimand and explicitly not native lazy loading
causal_protocols.STACK_RESIDENT_CONTEXT: single-turn resident catalog/default-context ablation; excludes default hook effect
causal_protocols.PROBE_HOOK: same-turn prompt-triage is eligible; canary/drift probes require T1 mutation/claim and T2 same-session hook delivery in an isolated per-run workspace

security.child_environment: allowlist with isolated temporary HOME; no API secret variables
security.claude_tool_egress: unsafe until Bash command-level egress isolation is proven; abort as blocker

decision_gates.keep_default_on: >=5pp pass-rate lift; CI95 lower >0; no material-scope increase; median token overhead <=15%
decision_gates.safety_exception: >=2 distinct P0/P1 failures prevented; no pass-rate regression; overhead <=15%
decision_gates.demote_role_brief: no frontier lift; mid-tier lift >=5pp with CI95 lower >0
decision_gates.manual_quarantine: ambiguous quality effect and overhead <=10%; one release; never auto-trigger
decision_gates.retire: no quality lift with overhead >=10%, or CI95 upper <=0
decision_gates.disable_harmful: >=5pp task-success regression or attributable material scope/safety violation
decision_gates.executable_tool_skills: tool-specific deterministic gates; do not score explanatory style
